name: United States Postal Service
description: The United States Postal Service delivers mail and packages to every address in the nation.

name: National Association of Letter Carriers
description: The National Association of Letter Carriers represents city delivery letter carriers employed by the USPS.

name: Shiloh Baptist Church Biloxi
description: Shiloh Baptist Church serves the Biloxi-Woolmarket community through worship, outreach, and discipleship.

name: Mississippi Gulf Coast Community College
description: Two-year community college serving the Mississippi Gulf Coast with workforce and continuing education programs.

name: Veterans of Foreign Wars (VFW)
description: The VFW advocates for veterans and service members, and supports communities through service and camaraderie.
